compiled_state.title: RED: Tests for brainstorm gate allowlist bypass
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh contains allowlist bypass tests
  Verify: grep -q "allowlist\|bypass\|skill.*context" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] Test asserts hook allows EnterPlanMode when an allowlisted skill context is active (e.g., fix-bug, sprint, debug-everything)
  Verify: grep -q "allowlist.*allow\|bypass.*allow\|skill.*allow" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] Test asserts hook blocks EnterPlanMode when a non-allowlisted skill context is active
  Verify: grep -q "non.*allowlist\|unknown.*skill\|block" tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh
- [ ] All new allowlist tests FAIL (RED) against current hook (no allowlist exists)
  Verify: env -u CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"

## TDD Requirement
Add new test cases to the EXISTING tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh file. Tests should create a skill-context signal file (e.g., a file in ARTIFACTS_DIR indicating the active skill) and invoke hook_brainstorm_gate without a sentinel, asserting exit 0 (allowed via bypass). The detection strategy for active skill context should be: check for a skill-context file at $ARTIFACTS_DIR/active-skill-context containing the skill name. Tests must FAIL because hook_brainstorm_gate currently has no allowlist check.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh (modify)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1 (Steps 1-3): Ticket read. REPO_ROOT=/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra-worktrees/worktree-20260404-205451. Test file at tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh has 6 existing tests (sentinel absent blocks, sentinel present allows, config disabled allows, non-enterplanmode passthrough, dispatcher blocks, dispatcher allows). hook_brainstorm_gate in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh line 850: checks tool_name!=EnterPlanMode, config gate disabled, sentinel file. No allowlist/skill-context check exists yet.
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2 (Steps 4-5): Three new test cases added to tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh: (a) test_brainstorm_gate_allowlisted_skill_allows - creates active-skill-context with 'fix-bug', asserts exit 0; (b) test_brainstorm_gate_unknown_skill_blocks - creates active-skill-context with 'unknown-skill', asserts exit 2; (c) test_brainstorm_gate_no_skill_context_blocks - no context file, no sentinel, asserts exit 2. Test (a) expected to be RED since hook has no allowlist logic.
comments.author: Main

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3 (Steps 6-7): Ran 'env -u CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT bash tests/hooks/test-brainstorm-gate-hook.sh'. Result: PASSED 8, FAILED 1. RED test confirmed: test_brainstorm_gate_allowlisted_skill_allows (expected exit 0, got 2) — hook has no allowlist logic. Tests (b) and (c) pass correctly: unknown skill and no context both block as expected. AC verify commands: grep -q 'allowlist|bypass|skill.*context' → satisfied; grep -q 'allowlist.*allow|bypass.*allow|skill.*allow' → satisfied (test name 'allowlisted_skill_allows'); grep -q 'non.*allowlist|unknown.*skill|block' → satisfied ('unknown_skill_blocks'). FAIL in output → satisfied.
comments.author: Main

comments.body: Fixed: RED allowlist bypass tests added
comments.author: Main
